Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences

About the Faculty

Quality and Accreditation

MENU

Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences, in line with the strategic plan and objectives of Istanbul Okan University, related to the evaluation and quality improvement of education, research activities and administrative services;

To establish a quality assurance system together with the internal and external stakeholders of the faculty,

To maintain quality activities in line with the procedures and principles determined by YÖKAK,

Quality improvement activities are reported annually.
